classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为电机端面结构图，含动力线引出位置、线长'L=350~360mm,'、外径'φ70+0.03/0'和'φ78.9Max(含碳纤维)'等尺寸标注；U、V、W仅标在线缆端部，未给出针脚编号与功能对应表，因此最符合机械尺寸类。

title.title_en: Power Wire and Outline Dimension Drawing

text_annotations.correction_note: Combined fragmented OCR reads; standardized spacing and capitalization
OCR read as 司 (conf 0.347); visually appears to be phase label U
OCR read as IW (conf 0.498); visually appears to be phase label W
OCR read as C (conf 0.208); visually appears to be phase label V based on context
Corrected diameter symbol and tolerance format; chose higher confidence read (0.928 vs 0.828)
Merged envelope dimension with material note
Isolated label, possibly datum or protection rating indicator

drawing_metadata.drawing_type: Motor end view with power wire connection

terminology_notes: Power wire terminology follows electrical connector standards
Phase labels U, V, W follow IEC convention
Carbon fiber note indicates composite material construction
translation_notes: Strip refers to wire insulation removal length
Tin refers to tin plating/coating of exposed conductor

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Three-phase (U, V, W) power wire connection with 350~360mm length; requires 8mm strip and tin plating preparation
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Motor mounting bolt pattern, axial dimensions, shaft details, protection rating (P label unclear), orientation/clocking requirements

unresolved_items.reason: Confidence below 0.5 or visually identified as structural line artifacts; no clear engineering meaning
Isolated label with no visible dimensioning context; may indicate IP rating, mounting position, or datum but cannot confirm from visible annotations

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框为电机性能参数表，全文标注源图中绿色框对应该表；可见'Rated Torque'、'Rated Speed'、'Maximum torque'、'Maximum speed'、'rpm'、'N•m'等扭矩和转速性能参数，虽不是曲线但在现有类别中最接近电机扭矩转速性能类信息。

regions.content:
1. 带★要求，为产品重要和关键特性
    Requirements marked with ★ indicate important and critical features of the product
  2. 引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损伤
    The outgoing line cannot be disconnected, and the insulation layer and wire core cannot be damaged
  3. 定子引出线参照GB/T 7345-2008要求
    The stator outgoing line shall comply with the requirements of GB/T 7345-2008
  4. 对于定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9.0N的拉力
    For stator three-phase wires, each lead out wire should be able to withstand a tensile force of 9.0N
regions.content_en:
1. Lead wires must not be disconnected; insulation and conductor must not be damaged
    The outgoing line cannot be disconnected, and the insulation layer and wire core cannot be damaged

  2. For stator three-phase wires, each lead wire shall withstand a pull of 9.0 N
    For stator three-phase wires, each lead out wire should be able to withstand a tensile force of 9.0N

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框内为'线束定义表Wire Singal Defintion'表格，列出'U相 MOTOR U'、'V相 MOTOR V'、'W相 MOTOR W'与引线颜色'兰 BL'、'棕 BR'、'紫 PU'以及线径'12AWG'的对应关系，属于电机动力相线的接线定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 图中为'未注线性公差'说明表，按尺寸区间对应给出±0.2到±1.2的线性公差，属于机械图纸中的尺寸与公差标注。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
